This certificate records the safe disconnection of the circuit or appliance described. No live testing has been carried out — it is not a Minor Works or Installation Certificate. Retain for future reference.
{% if companyLogo and companyLogo != '' %}{% endif %}

Safe Isolation Confirmation
Circuit / appliance safely isolated and proved dead{% if madeDead %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
Exposed conductors safely terminated / made safe{% if terminationsSafe %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
Disconnected point labelled where required{% if labelled %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
No risk of inadvertent reconnection / left safe{% if noReconnectionRisk %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
Remainder of installation left in safe working order{% if remainderSafe %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
Client advised: reconnection by a competent person only{% if reconnectionAdvised %}Confirmed{% else %}Not confirmed{% endif %}
Declaration & Signatures
I confirm that the circuit / appliance described above has been safely disconnected and made dead in accordance with safe isolation practice (GS38). No live testing has been carried out as part of this disconnection.
